zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Maud de Flamville於1153年出生在英國越可爾索普 阿其時，她的父親Roger de Flamville38歲，母親Juetta de Arches16歲。她和Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1219年在英國素福爾可比爾德斯頓享年66歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Maud de Flamville was born in 1153, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger de Flamville, was 38 and her mother, Juetta de Arches, was 16. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings. She died in 1219, in Bildeston, Suffolk, England, at the age of 66.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings. Elle est décédée en 1219, à Bildeston, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Maud de Flamville(이)가 1153년 영국 요르크실르 소 아치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Flamville(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juetta de Arches(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 수폴크 빌데스턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.
